race.name: Human
race.ability: Str 1, Dex 1, Con 1, Int 1, Wis 1, Cha 1

trait.name: Languages
trait.text: You can speak, read, and write Common and one extra language.

class.name: Fighter
class.proficiency: Strength Saving Throws, Constitution Saving Throws, Acrobatics, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival

feature.name: Fighting Style
feature.text: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

feature.name: Second Wind
feature.text: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself.

trait.name: Shelter of the Faithful
trait.text: Faith communities recognize and aid you.

feat.name: Grappler
feat.text: You have developed the skills necessary to hold your own in close-quarters grappling.

spell.name: Bless
spell.components: V, S, M (a sprinkling of holy water)
spell.text: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range.
